title: FPS QR Code Generation
description: Generate HKMA-standard FPS EMV QR code for payments
code:
import qrcode
from io import BytesIO

def _tlv(tag: str, value: str) -> str:
    return f'{tag}{len(value):02d}{value}'

def _crc16(data: bytes) -> str:
    crc = 0xFFFF
    for byte in data:
        crc ^= byte << 8
        for _ in range(8):
            crc = (crc << 1) ^ 0x1021 if crc & 0x8000 else crc << 1
            crc &= 0xFFFF
    return f'{crc:04X}'

def generate_fps_qr(proxy_id: str, amount: float, currency: str = 'HKD') -> bytes:
    parts = [
        _tlv('00', '01'),
        _tlv('01', '12'),
        _tlv('26', _tlv('00', 'hk.com.hkicl') + _tlv('01', '01') + _tlv('02', proxy_id)),
        _tlv('52', '0000'),
        _tlv('53', '344'),
        _tlv('54', f'{amount:.2f}'),
        _tlv('58', 'HK'),
    ]
    raw = ''.join(parts) + '6304'
    payload = raw + _crc16(raw.encode('ascii'))
    qr = qrcode.make(payload)
    buf = BytesIO()
    qr.save(buf, format='PNG')
    return buf.getvalue()

title: GovHK Weather API
description: Fetch current weather from Hong Kong Observatory REST API
code:
import httpx

async def get_hk_weather(lang: str = 'en') -> dict:
    url = 'https://data.weather.gov.hk/weatherAPI/opendata/weather.php'
    params = {'dataType': 'rhrread', 'lang': lang}
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        resp = await client.get(url, params=params)
        resp.raise_for_status()
        return resp.json()

async def get_9day_forecast(lang: str = 'en') -> dict:
    url = 'https://data.weather.gov.hk/weatherAPI/opendata/weather.php'
    params = {'dataType': 'fnd', 'lang': lang}
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        resp = await client.get(url, params=params)
        resp.raise_for_status()
        return resp.json()

title: HK Address Parser
description: Parse Hong Kong addresses into structured components
code:
import re
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class HKAddress:
    territory: str = ''
    district: str = ''
    building: str = ''
    floor: str = ''
    unit: str = ''
    street: str = ''

def parse_hk_address(address: str) -> HKAddress:
    result = HKAddress()
    text = address.strip()
    lower = text.lower()
    for key, val in {'hong kong': 'Hong Kong Island', 'kowloon': 'Kowloon', 'new territories': 'New Territories'}.items():
        if key in lower:
            result.territory = val
            break
    fm = re.search(r'(\d{1,3})\s*/\s*[Ff]|(\d{1,3})[Ff]\b|[Ff]loor\s*(\d{1,3})', text)
    if fm:
        result.floor = next(g for g in fm.groups() if g)
    um = re.search(r'(?:Unit|Flat|Room)\s*([A-Za-z0-9]+)', text, re.I)
    if um:
        result.unit = um.group(1)
    bm = re.search(r'([\w\s]+?(?:Building|Tower|Mansion|Court|House|Plaza|Centre))', text, re.I)
    if bm:
        result.building = bm.group(1).strip()
    sm = re.search(r'(\d+[-–]?\d*\s+[\w\s]+?(?:Road|Street|Avenue|Lane))', text, re.I)
    if sm:
        result.street = sm.group(1).strip()
    return result

title: Octopus Payment Integration
description: Octopus card merchant payment client with tap-authorize-confirm flow
code:
import httpx
from datetime import datetime, timezone

class OctopusClient:
    def __init__(self, base_url: str, api_key: str):
        self.base_url = base_url.rstrip('/')
        self.api_key = api_key

    async def create_payment(self, merchant_id: str, amount: float, reference: str = '') -> dict:
        headers = {'X-Api-Key': self.api_key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            # Phase 1+2: initiate and authorize
            resp = await client.post(
                f'{self.base_url}/payments',
                headers=headers,
                json={'merchant_id': merchant_id, 'amount': amount, 'reference': reference},
            )
            resp.raise_for_status()
            txn = resp.json()
            # Phase 3: confirm
            confirm = await client.post(f'{self.base_url}/payments/{txn["transaction_id"]}/confirm', headers=headers)
            confirm.raise_for_status()
            return confirm.json()

title: HK Business Registration Validator
description: Validate Hong Kong Business Registration (BR) number format
code:
import re

def validate_br_number(br: str) -> bool:
    """Validate HK Business Registration number.

    Format: 8 digits followed by 3 digits (branch),
    e.g., 12345678-001
    """
    cleaned = re.sub(r'[\s-]', '', br)
    if not re.match(r'^\d{8}\d{3}$', cleaned):
        return False
    main_number = cleaned[:8]
    branch = cleaned[8:]
    return int(main_number) > 0 and int(branch) >= 0

def format_br_number(br: str) -> str:
    cleaned = re.sub(r'[\s-]', '', br)
    if len(cleaned) == 11:
        return f'{cleaned[:8]}-{cleaned[8:]}'
    return br

title: GovHK Transport ETA
description: Fetch real-time bus ETA from KMB open data API
code:
import httpx
from datetime import datetime

KMB_BASE = 'https://data.etabus.gov.hk/v1/transport/kmb'

async def get_bus_eta(stop_id: str, route: str) -> list[dict]:
    url = f'{KMB_BASE}/eta/{stop_id}/{route}/1'
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        resp = await client.get(url, timeout=10)
        resp.raise_for_status()
        data = resp.json()
    results = []
    for item in data.get('data', []):
        if item.get('eta'):
            eta_time = datetime.fromisoformat(item['eta'])
            results.append({
                'route': item.get('route', route),
                'destination': item.get('dest_en', ''),
                'eta': eta_time.strftime('%H:%M'),
                'remarks': item.get('rmk_en', ''),
            })
    return results
